title: Session status should show what value crosslink is providing
description: Currently session status shows: session number, start time, active work item, and duration. This is correct but feels inert — the user said 'I don't think it's doing anything at all.' Consider enriching status output with: actions recorded this session, comments added, interventions tracked, or a brief 'what this session captured' summary. Make crosslink feel alive. Ref: bsky thread lowd.cc/3mh4vf3fias2x
